metadata.name: Author a New Analytical Test Method

description: R&D has developed a new way to test for an impurity. A lab manager must formally document and approve this method in the LIMS.

nodes.task_description: Create a new test method document in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent initiates a new, blank test method template.

nodes.task_description: Enter the step-by-step procedure for the new analytical method, including required reagents and instrument parameters.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly documents the entire analytical procedure.

nodes.task_description: Submit the new method for review and approval by the lab director.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the method into the approval workflow.
